input.command:
for d in 2025/12/29 2025/12/30; do
  f="articles/$d/articles.jsonl"; [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  echo "=== $d ($(wc -l < $f)) ==="
  cat "$f" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
kw=re.compile(r'charlotte|new year.s eve.*(plot|attack|arrest)|zelensky.*(defen|reshuff)|ume?rov|interim president|venezuela.*interim|defence minister|oreshnik|brisbane|nepal.*prime|portugal.*(president|vote)|bulgaria.*presid|tyson fury|nicaragua|starlink',re.I)
seen=set()
for line in sys.stdin:
    try: a=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    t=a.get('title','')
    if kw.search(t) and t not in seen:
        seen.add(t); print(' -',(a.get('source','?'))[:16],'|',t[:120])
" | head -22
done
